name: Aerosol Particle Size Distribution Measurements at Neumayer Station
description: Dataset containing hourly aerosol particle size distribution measurements (dN/dlogDp) across a range of particle diameters (92.87 nm to 4845.51 nm) collected at Neumayer Station, Antarctica (latitude -70.65, longitude -8.25, elevation 42.0 m) throughout 2019. Includes temporal metadata (start/end times, duration) and geographic coordinates.
